sharedStateObservations.description: Main help shows all commands (download, list, quantize, remove, serve, tui) with examples
Version command shows semantic version via click.version_option decorator
Each subcommand has comprehensive --help with options and examples
Serve command help documents all API endpoints (health, models, chat completions, completions)

reviewNotes: Help and version commands are comprehensive. Main help includes usage examples for common workflows. Version uses semantic versioning (0.1.0). Each subcommand documents its options and provides examples. Serve command help is particularly detailed, listing all available API endpoints. All 16 test_cli_help.py tests passing.
